# mant verified topics: arch
# scanned 2026-07-21 with --force-libmandoc; no parser crash observed
# C-locale topics only (localized man/<lang>/ copies excluded).
# High-volume same-pattern sections are summarised (count + samples).
# packages: 43; total pages: 3745
